invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$2900（支撑位），或费率转正且价格停滞（挤压失效），或新闻利好被证伪（买入信号无效）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $2900 (support level), or funding turns positive with price stagnation (squeeze invalidated), or news catalyst disproven (buy signal invalid).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$124（基于ATR止损），或资金费率Z值转正且价格下跌（挤压失效），或市场整体趋势恶化（BTC跌破关键支撑）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $124 (ATR-based stop), or funding Z-score turns positive with price decline (squeeze invalidated), or overall market trend worsens (BTC breaks key support).
